a.label: d_epsilon
a.standard_term: auxiliary constant m_epsilon(1-n_epsilon) used in Landen-transformation coordinate bookkeeping

b.label: F_epsilon(x)
b.standard_term: rational partial-fraction kernel reducing the third-kind integral to elementary terms plus K

evidence.label: Alternate closed form of the anti-invariant coefficient
Constant d_epsilon and F_epsilon in u-coordinate
evidence.summary: d_\epsilon=m_\epsilon(1-n_\epsilon) = \frac{1+\epsilon s}{16}. In the u-coordinate, F_\epsilon(u) = A_\epsilon \frac{m_\epsilon}{d_\epsilon-n_\epsilon u} -B_\epsilon. \tag{3.6}

evidence.label: Exact anti-invariant rational coefficient
evidence.summary: F_\epsilon(u)-F_\epsilon(b/u) = A_\epsilon m_\epsilon n_\epsilon \frac{u-b/u} {(d_\epsilon-n_\epsilon u) (d_\epsilon-n_\epsilon b/u)}. \tag{4.2}
